title: Norwegian Palm Sugar Crumble
description: A traditional Norwegian dessert with a twist of palm sugar. This crumble is perfect for warm weather and pairs well with a cup of coffee.
instructions: Mix the palm sugar and sugar in a bowl.
Add the sour cream to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the topping ingredients (if using).
Spread the topping mixture evenly over the filling.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
